title: Hundru Falls
tagline: Hundru Falls — heritage city of Jharkhand

overview.short: Hundru Falls is a waterfall located in Ranchi District in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
overview.description: Hundru Falls is a waterfall located in Ranchi District in the Indian state of Jharkhand. It is the 34th highest waterfall in India, and one of the most famous tourist places in the region.

topPlaces.name: Sikidiri
topPlaces.description: Sikidiri is a populated place in the Ormanjhi CD block in the Ranchi Sadar subdivision of the Ranchi district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Getalsud Dam
topPlaces.description: Getalsud Dam is an artificial reservoir situated in Ormanjhi, Ranchi, Jharkhand. It was constructed across the Subarnarekha River and was opened in 1971.

items.note: Sikidiri is a populated place in the Ormanjhi CD block in the Ranchi Sadar subdivision of the Ranchi district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
Getalsud Dam is an artificial reservoir situated in Ormanjhi, Ranchi, Jharkhand. It was constructed across the Subarnarekha River and was opened in 1971.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hundru Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hundru Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hundru Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (37 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hundru Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hundru Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hundru Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Hundru Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hundru Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sikidiri, Getalsud Dam.
